problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Neuromorphic. Neuromorphic spike-timing dependent plasticity directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Theoretical complexity proof with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
